title: SemEval-2007 - Word Sense Disambiguation
description: Word sense disambiguation task based on the SemEval-2007 English lexical sample (Pradhan et al.). Annotators identify the correct sense of a target word in context from a provided list of sense definitions.
citation:
@inproceedings{pradhan-etal-2007-semeval,
    title = "{S}em{E}val-2007 Task-17: {E}nglish Lexical Sample, {SRL} and All Words",
    author = "Pradhan, Sameer and Loper, Edward and Dligach, Dmitriy and Palmer, Martha",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Fourth International Workshop on Semantic Evaluations (SemEval-2007)",
    year = "2007",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/S07-1003",
    pages = "87--92"
}
